prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科（物理类）最低位次依次约 13573→19205→25058→22646→19306，整体呈后移趋势，2022 年大幅后移约 5600 名，2023 年进一步后移约 5800 名后于 2024–2025 年有所回升；2025 年基准约 19306 名；该校在内蒙古理科（物理类）计划数：2021 年 9 人、2022 年 15 人、2023 年 13 人、2024 年 13 人、2025 年 21 人；2026 年计划 25 人，较 2025 年扩招约 19%，扩招幅度较大，理论上会推高录取位次数字（竞争加剧）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名 2026 年约第 131 名，近年排名在 127–136 之间波动，整体稳定；该校在声誉监测中未见明显正面或负面事件；抖音热度总排名第 72，评价为「一般」，短视频曝光量处于中低水平，未出现报考关注度异常升温信号；投档异常记录中亦无该校数据，说明近年录取走势平稳；第五轮学科评估中新疆大学无 A- 及以上学科，整体学科实力处于中游水平，对高分考生的吸引力有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化（高热推荐）、软件工程/计算机类（推荐）等专业社会热度较高，对理科考生有一定吸引力；本省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 15.4 万，较 2025 年（约 11.6 万）大幅增长约 32%，竞争显著加剧；新疆大学位于新疆乌鲁木齐，距内蒙古较远，属于跨省招生；该校在内蒙古的招生计划占比较小（2025 年物理类 21 人），地域偏好对报考影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合扩招约 19% 推高位次数字、本省考生总数大幅增长约 32% 加剧竞争、以及专业热度（电气/计算机类偏热）对理科考生的吸引力，在 2025 年基准 19306 名基础上预计竞争进一步加剧；预测最低位次约 21593 名，区间 21093–22093 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 13573 → 19205 → 25058 → 22646 → 19306, showing an overall backward trend. In 2022, there was a significant backward shift of about 5600 places, and in 2023, a further backward shift of about 5800 places, followed by a recovery in 2024–2025. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 19306. The enrollment plan for this university in Inner Mongolia's science (physics category) was: 9 in 2021, 15 in 2022, 13 in 2023, 13 in 2024, and 21 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 25, an increase of about 19% compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion and theoretically will push the admission ranking number higher (increased competition).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 131st, with recent rankings fluctuating between 127 and 136, overall stable. No significant positive or negative events were observed in reputation monitoring. Its Douyin popularity ranks 72nd overall, rated as 'average', with short video exposure at a medium-low level, showing no abnormal surge in application attention. There are also no records of abnormal filing data for this university, indicating stable admission trends in recent years. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Xinjiang University has no A- or above disciplines, placing its overall discipline strength at a mid-level, with limited appeal to high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation (highly recommended), Software Engineering/Computer Science (recommended) have high social popularity and attract some science students. The total number of candidates for the 2026 general college entrance examination in this province is about 154,000, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (about 116,000), sharply intensifying competition. Xinjiang University is located in Urumqi, Xinjiang, far from Inner Mongolia, making it an inter-provincial enrollment. The university's enrollment plan in Inner Mongolia is relatively small (21 in physics category in 2025), so regional preference has limited impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the approximately 19% expansion pushing the ranking number higher, the significant increase of about 32% in the total number of candidates in this province intensifying competition, and the appeal of popular majors (electrical/computer science being relatively hot) to science students, competition is expected to further intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 19306. The predicted lowest ranking is approximately 21593, with a range of 21093–22093.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 21093–22093, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 21000), you can focus on aiming for popular majors like Electrical Engineering and Automation and Software Engineering. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 22000), it is recommended to mainly use Tier 3 safety majors.
